case_title: NAN HUI CHOE VS. TAYLOR KAHN

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 30.00- SERVED JUL-06-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KAHN, TAYLOR

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-14-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO SEP-13-2018 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF NAN HUI CHOE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE IS DEFECTIVE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-13-2018 - CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE TO SEP-27-2018 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY CHOE, NAN HUI AS TO DEFENDANT KAHN, TAYLOR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-14-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 40.00- SERVED AUG-20-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT KAHN, TAYLOR

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-27-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO NOV-15-2018 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF NAN HUI CHOE. DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. PROOF OF SERVICE IS DEEMED DEFECTIVE BY HONORABLE CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFF INSTRUCTED TO RESERVE CLAIM AND FILE A PROOF OF SERVICE WITH THE CLERKS OFFICE PRIOR TO THE NEXT HEARING. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE: CONTINANCE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 10.00- SERVED SEP-30-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KAHN, TAYLOR

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-15-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-15-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF NAN HUI CHOE. DEFENDANT TAYLOR KAHN DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-15-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHOE, NAN HUI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KAHN, TAYLOR $2,200.00 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,270.00, DEFENDANT BREACHED THE AGREEMENT TO PAY PLAINTIFF FOR THE CAR SHE SOLD HIM. THIS JUDGMENT DOES NOT RESOLVE ANY ISSUES REGARDING PARKING TICKETS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
